field.name: so_the_ts
field.check: so_the_ts not in (select so_the_ts from dmts)⩓so_the_ts in (select so_the_ts from dmts a left join dmdvcsks b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where b.ngay_ks >= @dateCurrent)⩓not exists(select 1 from cthspbts b where @@table.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts and @@table.tk_kh = b.tk_kh and @@table.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and @@table.ma_bp_ts = b.ma_bp_ts and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @$nam and b.ky = @$ky) and not exists(select 1 from dmts c where @@table.so_the_ts = c.so_the_ts and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1))⩓exists(select 1 from cthspbts b where @@table.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts and @@table.tk_kh = b.tk_kh and @@table.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and @@table.ma_bp_ts = b.ma_bp_ts and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and @@table.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and @@table.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @$nam and b.ky = @$ky) and not exists(select 1 from dmts c where @@table.so_the_ts = c.so_the_ts and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit = 1))

field.name: tk_kh
field.check: tk_kh not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: tk_cp
field.check: tk_cp not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_bp_ts
field.check: ma_bp_ts <> '' and ma_bp_ts not in (select ma_bp from dmbpts)

field.name: ma_kh
field.check: ma_kh <> '' and ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: ma_hd
field.check: ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)

field.name: so_lsx
field.check: so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)

processing.text:
if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'FAAllocationCoefficient', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @maxLength int, @r int, @dateCurrent smalldatetime
select @dateCurrent = dateadd(mm, 1, cast(str(@$nam, 4) + replace(str(@$ky, 2), ' ', '0') + '01' as smalldatetime)) - 1 select @maxLength = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = 'cthspbts' and column_name = 'so_lsx'
-- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@maxLength - len(rtrim(so_lsx))) + rtrim(so_lsx)
-- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from cthspbts b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts and a.tk_kh = b.tk_kh and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_bp_ts = b.ma_bp_ts and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx and b.nam = @$nam and b.ky = @$ky)
-- Checking &Checking;
-- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join cthspbts b on a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts and a.tk_kh = b.tk_kh and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_bp_ts = b.ma_bp_ts and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx where b.nam = @$nam and b.ky = @$ky delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.so_the_ts = b.so_the_ts and a.tk_kh = b.tk_kh and a.tk_cp = b.tk_cp and a.ma_bp_ts = b.ma_bp_ts and a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and a.ma_hd = b.ma_hd and a.so_lsx = b.so_lsx)
-- Insert &Inserting;
-- Update if @type = '1' &Updating; and a.nam = @$nam and a.ky = @$ky
